description: Fixed effects, random effects, Hausman test, and HDFE regression tests

tests.prompt: Run a fixed effects regression to control for unobserved firm-specific factors
tests.dataset_context: grunfeld dataset: firm, year, inv, value, capital

tests.prompt: Estimate a random effects model for the panel data
tests.dataset_context: nlswork dataset: id, year, ln_wage, age, union, tenure

tests.prompt: Should I use fixed effects or random effects? Run the appropriate test
tests.dataset_context: panel dataset: entity, time, y, x1, x2

tests.prompt: Test whether the individual effects are correlated with the regressors
tests.dataset_context: panel dataset: id, year, outcome, treatment, control1, control2

tests.prompt: Run a within-transformation regression absorbing entity fixed effects
tests.dataset_context: panel dataset: firm, year, profit, assets, employees

tests.prompt: Estimate with firm and year fixed effects absorbed
tests.dataset_context: panel dataset: firm, year, stock_return, earnings, book_value

tests.prompt: Run a regression with firm, year, and industry fixed effects using HDFE
tests.dataset_context: corporate dataset: firm, year, industry, roa, leverage, size

tests.prompt: Estimate a logit model with multiple fixed effects for the binary outcome
tests.dataset_context: binary_panel dataset: firm, year, default, leverage, size, profitability

tests.prompt: Run a Poisson regression absorbing county and year fixed effects
tests.dataset_context: count_data dataset: county, year, crime_count, unemployment, population

tests.prompt: Control for time-invariant heterogeneity in the wage equation
tests.dataset_context: labor dataset: person_id, year, wage, education, experience
